purpose: Block Gemini story-plan candidate promotion unless ambiguities, assumptions, source trace, expected result shapes, and forbidden claims are explicitly reviewed.
passConditions: Gemini invocation receipt exists and passed
candidate artifacts trace to dispatch, response, and invocation hashes
all ambiguities are preserved with explicit disposition
unsupported punctuation behavior is accepted, rejected, or blocked explicitly
blocked return shape is accepted, rejected, or blocked explicitly
promoted authority contains no unreviewed Gemini claims
candidate-only flags are removed only after authority promotion receipt
completionPosture: Gemini candidates are not authority until hardening receipts explicitly accept or block each ambiguity and promoted claim.
